reasoning: With only 39 days remaining until the July 1, 2025 resolution date, the likelihood of an IPO announcement is extremely low. On May 9, 2025, CEO Parker Conrad explicitly stated that Rippling has "no specific plans to go public," that an IPO is "not in the near future," and that the company must reach profitability first. Furthermore, they are relying on private liquidity events (tender offers) to satisfy employee liquidity needs, thus removing one of the main drivers for going public. Given the very recent denial, the lack of profitability, and the short remaining window, there is minimal chance of a public S-1 filing or announcement occurring before the deadline.
batch_queries: Before July 1, 2025, will Rippling announce that it is planning an IPO?
